findings.description: 14 tests constructed LineageResource without calling close(), causing daemon thread segfaults on CI during interpreter shutdown
findings.proposedRule: P40: Daemon thread resource tests MUST call close()

findings.description: Logging str(exc) for transport errors can leak credentials from exception messages (CWE-532)
findings.proposedRule: S-VI: Transport Error Logging — log type(exc).__name__ only, never str(exc)

findings.description: LineageResource created in factory scope started daemon thread at definition-load time, not resource-init time
findings.proposedRule: P41: Dagster resource creation inside generator

findings.source: Test failure during close() thread-alive test
findings.description: loop.close() on a still-running event loop raises RuntimeError — must guard with is_alive() check
findings.proposedRule: P42: Event loop lifecycle — close() after stop()+join(), guard with is_alive()

findings.description: Timed-out futures from run_coroutine_threadsafe continue running, accumulating work in the background loop
NoOpLineageResource used **kwargs while real class had explicit signatures, defeating type checking and IDE support
findings.proposedRule: P44: NoOp implementations must match real signatures
